Careers

Join us in saving lives and engineering the future

Our diverse team of talented people are dedicated to building technology that will radically improve human lives.

View the open positions
What drives our team

01

We know that there are people who need us. That’s why we’re here every day

Charles Wang

Senior Electrode R&D Engineer

02

Blackrock is the most resilient set of people that I’ve ever met in my life, and if they put their mind to something, we can achieve it.

Alicia Colvin

Product Manager

03

I think one of the best uses you can make of your knowledge and skills is to make a positive impact on people’s lives through implantable devices.

Shaunak Soman

Electrode Technical Project Manager

Our employee philosophy

At Blackrock, innovation drives us. We are a talented team of passionate individuals, motivated by our mission of helping people through neuroscience. If you are inspired by our mission and want to contribute to life-changing technology while pushing the boundaries in our field, you belong on our team.

We prioritize building a culture of inclusivity and respect for everyone. Our team is highly diverse, with over half of our company representing various minority groups and more than a third identifying as female. Everyone contributes their global viewpoints in an inclusive environment focused on innovation. For the Blackrock team, diversity is the art of thinking independently together.

Generous benefit packages are offered which include medical, dental, vision, short- & long-term disability, life insurance, commuter benefits, HSA/FSA accounts, and a 401k match program with immediate vesting. Our benefits are designed to promote a healthy work-life balance that allows our team to thrive. We offer self-managed PTO with no yearly cap and wellness (EAP, mental, financial, etc.) benefits to support employees in all areas of their lives. The team also enjoys fun activities like virtual yoga and Blackrock soccer games.

✔Self-managed/Unlimited PTO 👩‍⚕️Comprehensive Benefits Packages 💆‍♀️Wellness Resources 🎉 Yearly Week-long Company Holiday 🎓Tuition Reimbursement 💸 Peer Recognition Programs

Blackrock is committed to developing the neurotech leaders of tomorrow. As an intern, you will be given the chance to work on the same level as our employees on projects that have real-world applications. Your skills will be developed to a higher level as you work alongside experts in your chosen field.

We provide an array of internships in R&D, Accounting, Administration, Operations, Management, Marketing, Regulatory/Quality Systems, IT, and Manufacturing.

Mikael Haji – 2022 Intern in R&D:

“Interning with Blackrock Neurotech was a life-changing experience. As a 16-year-old passionate about the field of Brain-Computer Interfaces, I was thrilled to have the opportunity to work alongside a team of experts who are dedicated to pushing the boundaries of neural engineering. During my internship, I gained invaluable real-world experience that has given me a unique edge in pursuing my career goals . . . The warm and inclusive culture of the company made me feel like I was part of a family, and I will always cherish the memories and experiences I gained during my time there.”

Chelsea Lord – 2022 – 2023 Intern in Regulatory:

“At my internship with Blackrock Neurotech, I experienced a whirlwind of new discoveries and knowledge, absorbing more in a single year than I ever thought possible. As I expanded my network among like-minded individuals, I realized I had found my tribe in the neurotech industry. Having always been passionate about neurotech, it was at Blackrock where I truly found my people and a sense of belonging.”

When to Apply:

Internships will be posted under our Careers page if we have any available.

Our team cares deeply about helping our communities and creating a positive impact in people’s lives. Blackrock sponsors numerous charitable events throughout the year, including food and blood drives benefiting community resource banks. In addition, our employees are involved in dozens of organizations across the country and regularly volunteer or contribute to numerous organizations including animal rights, patient charities, community education programs, sports leagues, homeless charities, and more.

In support of the impact our team makes every day, Blackrock gives employees PTO to volunteer at organizations that are important to them.

Blackrock is committed to a work environment in which all individuals are treated with respect and dignity. Everyone has the right to work in a professional atmosphere that promotes equal employment opportunity and prohibits unlawful discriminatory practices, including harassment. Therefore, Blackrock expects that all relationships among people in our company will be business-like and free of bias, prejudice, and harassment. It is the policy of Blackrock to ensure equal employment opportunity without discrimination or harassment based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, or status as a covered veteran. Blackrock prohibits any such discrimination or harassment.

To provide a safe and productive work environment, all offers of employment at Blackrock Neurotech are contingent upon a thorough background check. A criminal history will not automatically disqualify a candidate from an offer of employment.

Open positions

Search through our open job positions and apply today!


Please Be Aware of Recruitment Scams


We’ve been made aware of fraudulent individuals posing as Blackrock Neurotech recruiters.
Please note:

We will never ask for your driver’s license, Social Security Number or banking information via email, over the phone or during the interview process. Official communication will only come from the domains @blackrockneuro.com or Blackrock Neurotech via no-reply@ats.ripping.com Any other email addresses, interview invites or job offer communications should be considered suspicious.

If you’re unsure about the legitimacy of a message, please contact us directly through our contact information available on our website.

For more information on how to spot job scams, go to ftc.gov/jobscams.

Website by
Manage Consent
To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behavior or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.
Functional Always active
The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.
Preferences
The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.
Statistics
The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.
Marketing
The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.

  • Manage services
  • Manage {vendor_count} vendors
  • Read more about these purposes
